product.title: Pink Muhly Grass
product.body_html:
Pink Muhly Grass brings stunning pink clouds of color to your landscape each fall. This native ornamental grass is extremely easy to grow.

Hardiness Zone: 7-10

Light Needs: Full sun to part shade

Mature Height: 3 to 4 ft.

Mature Width: 3 to 4 ft.

Bloom Period: Late Summer, Fall

Plant Type: Perennial Grass
